title: Molten Fermented Italian Pretzels Orecchiette
description: A low-sodium Italian dish featuring fermented pretzels in the shape of orecchiette, cooked in individual mini cocottes with a molten center, using a tandoor for a unique flavor.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor to 500 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the fermented pretzel dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Use the orecchiette shape mold to shape the pretzels into the desired form.
Place the shaped pretzels in the individual mini cocottes.
Drizzle the olive oil over the pretzels and sprinkle with tandoor spice blend and salt-free seasoning blend.
Add the minced garlic on top of the pretzels.
Cover the mini cocottes with lids and bake in the preheated tandoor for 10 minutes.
Remove the lids and top each pretzel with shredded mozzarella cheese.
Return the mini cocottes to the tandoor and bake for an additional 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the mini cocottes from the tandoor and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
